question: What text is visible on the side of the woman's top during the barefoot water skiing scene? A. SKECHERS B. NAUTIQUE C. MasterCraft D. CAMP
How many distinct boat brand names are visible on the vessels in the video?
What color is the helmet worn by the person water skiing? A. Red B. Black C. White D. Green
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a white helmet and black wetsuit sits on a dock before water skiing across calm blue water. A red and white speedboat tows the skier past a floating black ramp structure. The skier launches off the ramp into mid-air and lands back on the water creating white spray. Green trees line the rocky shoreline in the background.

question: How many people are visible sitting in the back of the boat when the timer reads 0:00:07?

Did the video show BOTH a person sitting on a dock AND a boat with the text 'NAUTIQUE'? A. Only a person sitting on a dock B. Only a boat with the text 'NAUTIQUE' C. Both a person sitting on a dock and a boat with the text 'NAUTIQUE' D. Neither

What action is the person wearing a white helmet performing in the first segment? A. water skiing B. sitting on dock C. driving boat D. riding in boat
Describe the sequence of actions performed by the person wearing the white helmet from the start of the video until the end.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person wearing a white helmet sits on a dock holding a rope; at 2s, they begin water skiing across the calm blue water; at 8s, the skier jumps off a large dark floating ramp into the air; at 16s, the person performs another jump off a red and white ramp structure before skiing past buoys.
